benefits.description: Joint, tendon, and nerve issues mitigated severely

protocol_notes: 5/5 BPC-157/TB-500 mix. Total dose 500mcg daily (250mcg twice daily). Mixing: 100-200 units or 1-2mL bacteriostatic water into vials; 2mL recommended for easier dosing. For 10mg total with 100 unit syringe: 10 units per dose. Mixes vial immediately and keeps rest refrigerated. Injects with 45-90 degree angle approximately 1 inch from belly button, alternating sides. Uses insulin syringes. Managing back and knee issues for 17 years. Long-standing injuries include broken back, bulges, herniations, fissures, sciatica, torn meniscus.
